projectDescription: StackMap is a project-centric infrastructure graph that automatically discovers every service your app depends on and visualizes it as a live, interactive topology with expiry tracking and alerts.
keyFeatures: Automatic infrastructure discovery via domain seed (WHOIS + DNS)
Client-side .env parsing — secrets never leave the browser
OAuth integrations with Cloudflare, Vercel, and GitHub for live sync
Manual service entry for full control over your stack
Interactive React Flow graph with custom service cards, zoom, pan, and minimap
Domain and SSL certificate expiry tracking with alerts
Background DNS/WHOIS/SSL polling via queue workers
Project-scoped infrastructure topology with relationship edges
publicApiSurface: GET /api/projects/{id} — fetch project details and graph
POST /api/projects/{id}/services — add a service node manually
GET /api/projects/{id}/services — list all service nodes for a project
GET /api/auth/oauth/{provider} — initiate OAuth flow (cloudflare, vercel, github)
